note: Large deterministic atlas sample. Contract variants are generated from intrinsic evidence/status requirements, not gold chains. Template ids are audit metadata outside target_contract and are not consumed by synthesis.

Known-good identity-constrained combination contract: observed pass-chain where the terminal receiver is the original input passer. No planned combination, wall-pass intent, quality, causation, or optimality claim.

composition_constraints.description: The terminal receiver must be the original input passer.
